title: ARCUS 3 Pack Microfibre Extendable Duster, Washable Extendable Feather Duster For Cleaning, Flexible Duster For Home, Office, Bathroom, Garage, Window, Cupboard - Blue, Red, Green
features: CONTENTS: 3 microfiber extendable dusters in Blue, Red and Green.

EFFECTIVE CLEANING: Microfibre is known for its excellent dust-trapping ability. It can capture dust, dirt, and allergens more effectively than traditional dusters, reducing the need for harsh chemicals. The soft fibers of microfiber are gentle on surfaces, making it safe to use on delicate items like electronics, furniture, and artwork.
WASHABLE & REUSABLE: The microfiber dusters are machine washable, making them environmentally friendly and cost-effective since you can use them multiple times.

LIGHTWEIGHT & COMPACT: The lightweight design makes it easy to handle and maneuver, reducing fatigue during cleaning tasks. When retracted, an extendable duster can be easily stored in small spaces, making it convenient for quick cleanups.
EXTENDABLE: The extendable feature allows you to clean high or hard-to-reach areas, such as ceiling fans, light fixtures, and corners, without needing a ladder.
description: The 3-Pack Extendable Noodle Dusters are the ultimate cleaning companions for tackling dust in hard-to-reach areas. Featuring soft, flexible microfibre "noodles," these dusters trap and hold dust effectively, leaving surfaces spotless without scratching. With an extendable handle, they easily reach ceiling fans, high shelves, and tight corners, making them ideal for home or office use. Lightweight and ergonomic, these dusters ensure effortless cleaning while reducing strain. Plus, their washable and reusable design makes them an eco-friendly and cost-effective choice. Keep your space dust-free and sparkling with the convenience of this versatile 3-pack!
